economic_notes: Nation operates hydro-electric business (Xeitl Limited Partnership with BC Hydro 25-year PPA), fisheries business (Taku Wild Products Ltd. - sustainably caught wild salmon), Tlingit Homeland Energy Ltd., and other economic activities. GBE total assets $19,849,831 in 2021.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) incomplete tangible capital asset inventory - Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 recommendations and cannot provide complete inventory of major asset classes; (2) no approved budget prepared for year ended March 31, 2021. Prior year (March 31, 2020) was also qualified by a different auditor on February 11, 2022. Net financial assets on balance sheet is $6,753,566 but Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets shows $6,872,863 - likely difference relates to prepaid expenses classification. ISC recovery of $334,571 netted in revenue. Health and Social expenses split: Health $1,874,577 reported separately; Lands $1,198,453; Fisheries $789,056. 4 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 6 entities on modified equity basis including 2 government business partnerships.
